# PERF-009 positive: url.Parse inside loop
lang: go
file: PERF-009-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
)

func FetchAll(urls []string) ([]int, error) {
	statuses := make([]int, 0, len(urls))
	for _, raw := range urls {
		u, err := url.Parse(raw)
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		resp, err := http.Get(u.String())
		if err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		statuses = append(statuses, resp.StatusCode)
		resp.Body.Close()
	}
	return statuses, nil
}
